decisions.summary: Foundation already landed in commit e9914c9429 (record schema superset, src/lib/pan-dir/record.ts writer, sync-path status-override writer/reader, harness/model mirror, no-loss test — 63 related tests green). This plan scopes ONLY the remaining gaps + verification; the work agent verifies-and-completes, does not rebuild the foundation.

Record name = 'record' at <workspace>/.pan/records/<issue>.json on the feature branch (already implemented). Unifies with the PAN-1908 records plane; retires the 'continues' name the maintainer disliked.

Pipeline verdicts: keep the existing 'pipeline' mirror field (PanIssuePipelineRecord, from PAN-1908) in the record but do NOT expand verdict handling here. Making verdicts reconstruction-safe is PAN-1922. This issue keeps the record about WORK progress.
Backfill targets only IN-FLIGHT issues (live workspace/branch). The 132 historical closed .pan/continues/ files remain read-only legacy and are NOT migrated — resume only matters for in-flight work.

Continues become READ-ONLY LEGACY, not mass-deleted (AC6's 'removed or read-only legacy' escape hatch). No new writes to workspace continue.json or project .pan/continues/; readers stay for legacy/backfill.
CI guard and the enforced single-write-surface API are PAN-1921, NOT this issue. Here we only stop legacy writes far enough to make continues read-only, plus a one-shot no-loss assertion test.
No pan_records entry added to projects.yaml — the record is branch-resident and resolves from the workspace path; backfill's leftover infra-repo coupling is reconciled to the branch path.

hazards.summary: Split-brain already shipped: sync CLI path writes the record (vbrief/io.ts), but the async dashboard path vbrief/dag.ts:867-929 (mirrorTaskOperationToContinueFile) still writes workspace continue.json. Status overrides disagree depending on which path ran.
hazards.mitigation: Fix dag.ts FIRST (bead fix-async-statusoverride-splitbrain) so both paths converge on writeStatusOverride. No fallback chains — root cause.

hazards.summary: Migrating planning-spawn persistence (spawn-planning-session.ts:598) changes the exact path that wrote THIS session's continue.json.
hazards.mitigation: After the change, verify a planning session still persists/resumes its sessionHistory via the record.

hazards.summary: Backfill data loss: a wrong field map in records.ts permanently loses state once continues are retired.
hazards.mitigation: Bead complete-backfill-migration is inspection-gated (requiresInspection); retire-continues bead is blocked on it. Backfill test asserts statusOverrides+harness+model+schemaVersion:2 land.

hazards.summary: The record file lands on main at branch merge (it is git-tracked, not ignored).
hazards.mitigation: Acceptable — continues already land on main today. Keep record writes on the branch only during work; never commit the record to main mid-work (PAN-1124).

hazards.summary: getIssueRecordPath reconstructs the workspace path from project root + workspaces/feature-<id>; container/remote contexts may differ from the live cwd.
hazards.mitigation: Prefer getIssueRecordPathForWorkspace(workspacePath, issueId) where an explicit workspace path is available; note in the dashboard-route bead.

resumePoint.description: No unblocked beads remain for PAN-1919; run `bd ready -l pan-1919` to verify or claim the next bead if any exist.

sessionHistory.content: Planning session for PAN-1919 (--auto). Discovered a plan-after-code situation: commit e9914c9429 already landed the record foundation (record schema superset, writer, sync-path wiring, harness/model mirror, no-loss test). No existing spec/beads. Scoped a remaining-work plan of 10 beads: fix async split-brain, route 4 continue-writer surfaces to the record, complete the backfill (inspection-gated), retire continues to read-only legacy, plus no-loss-guard + cross-machine-resume + legacy-test beads.

Implemented bead workspace-2yrwn (fix-async-statusoverride-splitbrain): rewrote vbrief/dag.ts mirrorTaskOperationToContinueFile as mirrorTaskOperationToRecord, writing statusOverrides to the per-issue record via the new async writeStatusOverrides helper in pan-dir/record.ts. Removed continue.json read/write from the async dashboard path; sync CLI path (dag-cli.ts/io.ts) already wrote the record. Typecheck + targeted tests pass.

Implemented bead workspace-so3r8 (route-done-continue-to-record): replaced done.ts readWorkspaceContinue/writeWorkspaceContinue calls with record reads/writes. recordTestWaiver now appends a decision entry via appendDecisionEntry; end-of-session append uses appendSessionEntry. Added async writeIssueRecord and appendDecisionEntry helpers to pan-dir/record.ts. Updated the corresponding unit test to assert the record file. Typecheck + done tests pass.

Implemented bead workspace-0z0y6 (route-planning-continue-to-record): replaced spawn-planning-session.ts writeWorkspaceContinue planning seed with appendSessionEntry to the per-issue record. Updated the launcher init message to point the planning agent at the record file path. Typecheck + spawn-planning-session tests pass.

Implemented bead workspace-3091t (route-cloister-continue-readers-to-record): routed work-agent-prompt.ts feedback and planning-context reads, plus handoff-context.ts continueState read, to the per-issue record via readIssueRecord. Also updated getTrackerContext to use the record file mtime for 'new comments since last state update'. Removed now-unused readWorkspaceContinue and getWorkspacePanPaths imports. Typecheck + cloister prompt/handoff tests pass.

Implemented bead workspace-nsvkk (route-dashboard-continue-to-record): routed dashboard start-agent continue write to the per-issue record (gitState/model/sessionHistory via readIssueRecord/writeIssueRecord/queueIssueRecordCommit). Routed workspaces state-md read and service-URL discovery to the record file instead of workspace continue.json. Removed dashboard continue-state helper functions and unused imports. Typecheck + dashboard route tests pass.

Implemented bead workspace-fmjxz (complete-backfill-migration): extended records.ts buildIssueRecord to merge workspace continue.json statusOverrides over legacy project .pan/continues/ data and to copy harness/model from the agent state.json. Records now emit schemaVersion:2. Updated records-backfill.ts to target only in-flight issues with a live workspace, decoupled from the infra-repo gate, and use the branch-resident record path. Added/updated tests for statusOverrides, harness/model, and workspace-scoped backfill. Typecheck + targeted tests pass.
